title: Remove access denied from admin panel page

requirements.summary: Fix admin panel to prevent authenticated admin users from seeing 'access denied' messages by ensuring the admin role check waits for full authentication and actor initialization before evaluating privileges
acceptanceCriteria: An authenticated user with admin role can navigate to the admin panel without seeing any 'access denied' message.
The admin panel does not flash or render an 'access denied' state while authentication or role resolution is still loading.
The admin role query uses the authenticated actor, not the anonymous actor.
Non-admin authenticated users still see an appropriate denied/unauthorized message.
Unauthenticated users are prompted to log in rather than shown a permanent access denied error.

file_operations.description: Modify the AdminPanel component to properly sequence authentication and authorization checks. Add explicit loading states that wait for both identity initialization and actor readiness before querying admin role. Replace premature access-denied rendering with a loading state while authentication is in progress. Ensure the isAdmin query is only enabled after the actor is available and not fetching. Show 'access denied' only after authentication is confirmed complete and the user is determined to be non-admin. For unauthenticated users, show a login prompt instead of access denied.
